_meta.purpose: Regression fixture for the v0.7.0 polish-quality investigation.
_meta.context: These are the failure modes that pushed home-stt back from Qwen2.5-1.5B to Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507 as the default polish model. Each case captures one class of error that smaller / less-instruction-following models produced, with assertion rules the *correct* (current) polish output must satisfy.
_meta.source: README.md §'v0.7.x 效能與品質投資紀錄' + commits 676553a, 3d7ae7d, 23c8d07.

schema.category: one of: english_keyword | identifier_fidelity | semantic_fidelity | subject_preservation | overformalization | no_english_translation | filler_removal | repetition_fix
schema.must_contain: substrings the polished output MUST contain (English keywords, identifiers, etc.)
schema.must_not_contain: substrings that MUST NOT appear (translations, wrong subjects, fact reversals, etc.)
schema.max_edit_ratio: optional: ceiling on Levenshtein distance / input length. 0.3 = output should differ by ≤30% chars from input. Catches over-rewrites.

_meta.running: pytest tests/test_polish_bench.py — requires actual polish model loaded (~8 GB VRAM on Win, ~4 GB RSS on Mac). Skip-by-default in CI.

cases.input: 幫我 review 這個 commit 然後 push 到 main
cases.note: Qwen2.5-1.5B silently swapped commit→push (wrong verb production bug). Qwen3-4B preserves all English tech verbs.

cases.input: 呃這個 Python function 的 async 部分需要改
cases.note: English tech keywords must not be translated, even though OpenCC has 函式 in its TW vocab dict — polish should respect verbatim English.

cases.input: 把 _USE_TORCH_COMPILE 設成 True 試試
cases.note: Qwen2.5-0.5B dropped the underscore prefix. Identifiers are opaque tokens — must be preserved byte-for-byte.

cases.input: 改一下 build_polisher 跟 build_backend_with_fallback 這兩個
cases.note: snake_case identifiers must survive polish unchanged.

cases.input: INT4 量化在這台機器上反而更慢
cases.note: Qwen2.5-1.5B flipped 更慢→更快 (semantic reversal hallucination). Polish must never invert the speaker's claim.

cases.input: polish 從 4.26 秒降到 1.9 秒
cases.note: Numerical facts must survive — silent number mutation is fatal for technical dictation.

cases.input: 嗯幫我改一下這段程式碼
cases.note: Qwen2.5-0.5B swapped 幫我→幫你 (subject swap). Polish must preserve pronoun roles.

cases.input: 你那邊的 daemon 跟我這邊的版本應該一樣
cases.note: Both 你 and 我 must survive — small models sometimes collapse them.

cases.input: 我想要解決這個 latency 問題
cases.note: Qwen2.5-1.5B over-formalised 想要解決→目的是為了解決. Polish should preserve conversational tone.
Qwen2.5-1.5B swapped 實作→實現 (mainland register). TW vocab should be preserved.

cases.input: 找不到 prebuilt wheel 只好自己 compile
cases.note: Qwen2.5-1.5B translated prebuilt wheel→預建的輪子 (literal noun translation). English jargon must stay English.

cases.input: PyTorch 跟 transformers 都要先裝好
cases.note: Library / brand names must survive verbatim.

cases.input: 呃我覺得這個 design 還可以
cases.note: Core polish duty: remove 呃/嗯/那個/就是/然後 fillers.

cases.input: 然後就是那個 commit 之後直接 push
cases.note: Multi-filler removal — 然後 + 就是 + 那個 stacked, all must go.

cases.input: 我我我覺得這樣比較好
這個這個那個 function 寫得不太對
cases.note: Repeated demonstratives + filler before noun, all must collapse.

cases.input: 呃所以我剛剛在想說那個 polish 的 prompt 是不是太長了然後 latency 就會上升
cases.note: Realistic mid-length dictation — preserve technical content, remove the dictation-ish filler pattern.
v0.7.2 O7: short responses like 「好」 must now reach polish (they were silent-rejected by MIN_AUDIO_SEC=0.3 before). Already-clean input should pass through near-untouched.
